programme.desc: Set 30 years after Dr. Sam Beckett stepped into the Quantum Leap accelerator and vanished, follows a new team that must restart the project hoping to understand the mysteries behind the machine and its creator.

programme.title: SHERO - EP 17
programme.desc: Yinchen breaks up with Ruixiang. Yalian tells Yinchen about the death of Ruixiang's ex-fiancee Xiaomin, hoping Yinchen could give him another chance. When Yinxi is assaulted and the sisters are in danger, Ruixiang saves them, gaining back Yinchen's trust. Yinxi finally remembers Junsheng and how she feels towards him. Yinchen accompanies Ruixiang on his work trip, where he planned a surprise...

programme.title: SHERO - EP 18
programme.desc: Yinxi remembers that she was investigating their parents' death before she was attacked. Feihong realizes that Yinchen and Yinxi are the daughters of Zhang Tianyou Meihua admits that she wants Yinxi dead. The police investigate RSB for illegal activities. In order to protect his wife and son, Feihong decides to surrender himself to the police...

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 21
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. His first heroic deed does not go as planned since he ended up owing the owner Xiao Se a debt for the damages to his place. Left with no choice, Lei Wu Jie takes Xiao Se along. On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 22
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. programme.title: C. L. I. F. 5 - EP 11
programme.desc: An assassination occurs during a press conference on the collaboration between Lucas and the Prince of the Middle East and chaos ensues. The culprit manages to escape despite Man Ting's pursuit. The Prince's doctor, Dr Johnson, is shot and sent to the hospital. A car accident occurs en route and the wounded Dr Johnson alights from the ambulance and leaves...

programme.title: C. L. I. F. 5 - EP 12
programme.desc: Jia Ming finds a USB inside Man Ting's bag but she claims that it does not belong to her. Jia Ming brings the encrypted USB home and unlocks it. He passes the USB to Xiao Tian when he realises it is Jess' vaccine formula. Now all that is left to be found is the poison gas formula. Jia Hao uses Dr Johnson's family to threaten him into revealing the formula. He relents and gives in.

programme.title: King Of Culinary - EP 9
programme.desc: Last week, the battle between two Nonya dishes left sparks in the studio. Will Chef Eric Neo be able to keep his knives intact? Next up, a challenger specially flew back from overseas to pit her culinary skills against our celebrity chef. And she is using a recipe handed down by her Grandpa. We will also be witnessing the most composed challenger to date. Despite the immense pressure of the competition, she appears to be very much at ease cooking away in our "arena kitchen".

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 110
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 16
programme.desc: Lightning strikes have been making headlines. A lightning strike survivor recounts the terrifying moment it happened. With El Niño here, could thunderstorms become less frequent? Meanwhile, authorities are stepping up rodent control with the help of artificial intelligence, and the number of rat burrows has fallen by about 40%. But is that enough to solve the problem once and for all?

programme.title: No Other Way - EP 15
programme.desc: Hongtao is suspected of inciting murder after police find evidence in his home. Shiyuan provides a recording revealing Jialin as the mastermind. Keying suspects Shuheng is emotionally scarred, and Dr. Su offers to help. Shuheng recalls how Jialin humiliated Wanqing while Hongtao coldly stood by. After Hongtao is released, Shuheng punches him.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 79
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Heavenly Hand - EP 23
programme.desc: Xiao Cheng falsely claims that he is dating Cheng Qing after being intimidated by Situ Jiu, causing Cheng Qing to worry about the misunderstanding. Ouyang Zong joins Jia Ming's cello class, hinting that he may have a hidden agenda.

programme.title: Focus - EP 16
programme.desc: Across Southeast Asia, more people are redefining where—and how—they choose to live and work. From long-term residency seekers in Malaysia to digital nomads in Bali and Chiang Mai, this series follows individuals pursuing new beginnings, meaningful connections, and a different pace of life, while exploring how their journeys are reshaping the communities they now call home.

programme.title: 100% Wife - EP 70
programme.desc: Shuyun forces Youcai and Zhilin to return to Kaohsiung with her. Guanda tries to appease Shuyun and treats them to a farewell dinner so that Zhilin can meet Yanjun privately.

programme.title: 100% Wife - EP 71
programme.desc: Yanjun and Zhilin agree to remain as siblings, and Zhilin decides to stay in Taipei. Qianqian breathes a sigh of relief when she learns that the fortune teller has given the wrong birth date.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 275
programme.desc: A trusted and beloved product in Japan for over 50 years. Non-Chemical, Drug-Free Relief – Helps to relieve muscle pain without the use of heat, cold, or medication. Magnetism helps stimulate healthy blood flow and relieve your stiff muscles. Provides Targeted, Long-Lasting Effect, each patch can be used up to 5 days.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 308
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including Gymnema, Mulberry and Green Tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 300
programme.desc: Targets plantar fasciitis: relieves pain, reduces swelling, and stabilises the plantar fascia. With Japanese Bio-Ray technology, the sleeves compress tendons and muscles to boost blood and oxygen circulation. Arch support ensures stability while walking or standing. Non-slip, soft, breathable—comfortable all day under socks or during activity.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 55

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 56
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Nanxiu exposes Maoyong's relationship with Sulin on the company's anonymous online forum, severely damaging Maoyong's image. Despite Sulin's repeated warnings not to be manipulated by Nanxiu, Zhihui still chooses to trust him.

programme.title: Freedom Travelers - EP 5
programme.desc: Rongrong and Mile visit UNESCO-listed Yangdong Village, where they explore centuries-old hanok homes and learn to make traditional acorn jelly, discovering Korea’s deep culinary roots. In Yeongdeok, they witness the opening of snow crab season and feast on fresh seafood. The journey ends in Danyang with paragliding, taking in sweeping mountain views from above.

programme.title: Tale of the Nine-tailed - EP 21

programme.title: Dunia Tipu Tipu, Ujungnya Tetep I Lop U
programme.desc: It’s said that Acha and Daffa’s pre-wedding photoshoot suddenly fell through because Daffa was already seeing another girl. Later, on her younger sister’s advice, Acha decided to go ahead with the pre-wedding photoshoot with another man named Mamat.

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 4
programme.desc: Dafri has just returned to Indonesia to meet Alina and get engaged. However, the engagement is hindered because Nadia disapproves of Dafri’s relationship with her daughter, Alina. Nadia deliberately sent Dafri to study in Turkey to keep him away from her daughter. In addition, Dafri’s father asked him to marry Syifa, a woman he had just met for the first time. At that time, Syifa’s wedding fell through because her fiancé, Ilham, suddenly disappeared. After marrying Dafri, Syifa moved with her hu

programme.title: Mak Comblang Cantiknya Terlalu ke Selatan
programme.desc: Rere (Nabila Zavira) and Farhan (Kenny Austin) are matchmakers at a dating agency whose job is to find partners for many people. Farhan has had a lot of success in his work, while Rere has yet to succeed at all. The competition between them is fierce.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 60
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 206
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple living happily and simply in Magelang. They have a daughter, Zahra. Fathir works as a small-scale contractor. Meanwhile, Sukma is simply a homemaker. One day, Fathir lands a major project. Unfortunately, the project runs into trouble. Their problems multiply when their daughter, Zahra, is diagnosed with a serious illness. The doctor recommends that Zahra undergo treatment in Jakarta. Fathir, Sukma, Zahra, and Ira—Sukma’s adoptive mother—moved to Jakarta. W

programme.title: Saka Sisters - EP 6
programme.desc: Laila & Suri baru saja kematian Ayah. Mereka dikejutkan dengan kehadiran saka. Jamal, ekori mereka ke mana saja. Laila & Suri yang selama ini tidak rapat, terpaksa selesaikan hal Jamal bersama-sama.

programme.title: Miss Lawak - EP 9
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki selain Erra Fazira & Dato' AC Mizal sebagai juri tetap, siapakah di antara 18 gadis yang bakal merebut gelaran juara Miss Lawak 2019?

programme.title: Buka Kedai : Now In Tokyo - EP 7
programme.desc: Buka Kedai: Now in Tokyo menampilkan 4 selebriti Malaysia yang terdiri daripada Nabila Huda, Shashic, Leona dan Eric. Mereka bakal melakukan misi berniaga di Tokyo, Jepun.

programme.title: Tanya Sama Pokok - EP 8
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang kehidupan di sebuah kampung moden yang sudah semakin terdedah dengan kemodenan tetapi dalam waktu yang sama masih mengekalkan ciri-ciri hidup berkampung.

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 11

programme.title: Next To Neelofa - EP 8

programme.title: The Lucky Bini Show - EP 2

programme.title: The Berlian Job

programme.title: En Concert Prive Avec Vanessa Paradis
programme.desc: Vanessa Paradis ends seven years of discographic silence with ''Le Retour des beaux jours''. An eighth opus created with etienne Daho and Jean-Louis Pierot. During this mini-concert, recorded in an intimate setting, the artist performs six tracks from her new album.

programme.title: Vanessa Paradis, La Soiree
programme.desc: After seven years of discographic silence, Vanessa Paradis returned in 2025 with the album ''Le Retour des beaux jours'', created with etienne Daho and Jean-Louis Pierot. From the first notes to the public revelation, through the behind-the-scenes of the recording studios, an immersion into the singer's artistic intimacy.

programme.title: Tendance XXI - EP 26
programme.desc: Along with event curator Alexandre Samson, we look back at the ''1997 Fashion Big Bang'' exhibition at Paris's Musee Galliera. Discover the history of the lucky ladybird. Spotlight on candlemaking: the former royal manufactory, the house of Trudon celebrates its 380th anniversary. How should you wear a cape?

The four best friends set their heading for adventure, confronting their fears and working together to solve all their problems.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 65
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Conte-Nous ! - EP 11
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo - EP 11
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Demo De Mode - EP 9

programme.title: Et Doucement Rallumer Les etoiles
programme.desc: Twins Camille and Marie live happily with their parents in a seaside town on the Mediterranean coast. On the day of their 15th birthday, Marie throws herself off a cliff. The tragedy tears the family unit apart. Each person has to face their own questions and the complexity of grieving.

programme.title: Tendance XXI - EP 26
programme.desc: Along with event curator Alexandre Samson, we look back at the ''1997 Fashion Big Bang'' exhibition at Paris's Musee Galliera. Discover the history of the lucky ladybird. Spotlight on candlemaking: the former royal manufactory, the house of Trudon celebrates its 380th anniversary. How should you wear a cape?

programme.title: Pingouin Et Goeland Et Leurs 500 Petits
programme.desc: The story of an extraordinary couple. Daughter of deportees, the mother of director Michel Leclerc is taken in at the Sevres children's home in Hauts-de-Seine, an institution run by Roger and Yvonne Hagnauer, a couple of anti-Nazi pacifists whom everyone nicknamed ''Penguin'' and ''Seagull''.

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora - EP 5
programme.desc: Julianne, who has trouble dealing with her childhood memories, finds it difficult to accept that her mother was always showed more affection to her son than to her.

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora - EP 6
programme.desc: Remi has to accept the consequences of his acts and the fact that only time can heal the pain he'd known in the past.

programme.title: Serieux ? - EP 4
programme.desc: Marie-eve and Mathieu have a big sort out and decide to organise a rally to avoid the contents of their dustbins ending up as land-fill. Centres to deposit your waste, to sort it for recycling and for recycling electronic waste...

programme.title: 64' Actu

programme.desc: A magazine programme devoted to the mountains. An opportunity to explore a rich and fascinating world and take a sumptuous journey through the heart of the most beautiful landscapes of the Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes region.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. programme.title: La Belle Vie - EP 1
programme.desc: Julien sets off to visit Jean-Luc Kanape living in the land of his ancestors, where he has built a small off-grid cabin. Guardian of this territory of the caribou, he shares with Julien his love of the forest and of handing down the ancestral knowledge of the Innu.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres Normandes - EP 10
programme.desc: In Seine-Maritime, David Gallienne explores asparagus farming. With chef Melanie, they prepare a green asparagus and hazelnut tartare, topped with a white asparagus veloute and a poached egg.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus - EP 6
programme.desc: Four little dinosaurs, Rocky, Bill, Tiny and Mazu, discover a dangerous world where the mysterious Gigantosaurus, the most ferocious of all the dinosaurs, is forever on the prowl. The four best friends set their heading for adventure, confronting their fears and working together to solve all their problems.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 67
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 68
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux - EP 15
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux - EP 16
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: 1001 Mondes Antiques - EP 12
programme.desc: Braillard, Colombe and Lablatte have discovered a way of travelling back through ancient eras and civilisations. They embark on a journey back in time, passing through popular civilisations such as ancient Egypt and Greece, as well as sub-Saharan Africa, the Middle East and Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Conte-Nous ! - EP 12
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo - EP 12
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Demo De Mode - EP 10
programme.desc: Since the early 1990s, XULY.Bet has designed clothes that combine comfort and style with a commitment to sustainability. The fashion designer Lamine Badian Kouyate describes his work as he presents his spring-summer 2024 runway show.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil

programme.title: Le Point

programme.title: Pour Le Maillot Jaune...
programme.desc: The romantic relationship between a sports journalist and a cyclist during the 1939 Tour de France.

programme.title: La Premiere Marche
programme.desc: When Victoire, a young trans judoka, reaches the final of a regional competition, her opponent, Sonia, refuses to compete against her.

programme.title: Temps De Chien
programme.desc: The end of the pandemic put an end to Alice's side job, writing funeral orations, and her novel's publication is canceled. To help her out of this very bad patch, her fortune teller suggests writing horoscopes for cats and dogs.

programme.title: Opj - EP 1
programme.desc: Founder of an association helping troubled youth, Adele Meyer appears to be a generous and sincere woman. Yet she becomes the target of several assassination attempts. Commander Clarissa Hoarau is assigned to the case.

programme.title: Opj - EP 2
programme.desc: During her investigation, Commander Clarissa Hoarau makes strange discoveries. Adele Meyer's husband hides a delinquent past, and their neighbor turns out to be Captain Nico Storelli, the brigade's newest recruit.

programme.title: Movie - Kalakalappu (New)
programme.desc: A man struggles to save his family-owned restaurant as it is running losses. He soon falls for a health inspector keen on shutting down the place. When his brother enters the scene, things get worse.

programme.title: Movie - Zombie
programme.desc: Tired of their day-to-day lives, three friends decide to go on a vacation where they encounter zombies and meet a girl while running for their lives.

programme.title: Movie - Kumari Pennin Ullathile
programme.desc: Kumari Pennin Ullathiley is a Tamil feature film starring K. Bhagyaraj, Radhika Sarathkumar and Vijayan.

programme.title: Movie - Pulivarudhu
programme.desc: Ramesh's parents want him to fall in love while he prefers an arranged marriage. At a wedding, he meets and falls in love with Gayatri, and soon they are engaged.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Raakhee
programme.desc: A young man takes the law into his own hands. At first, it's to punish the people responsible for his sister's death, but he soon starts to target all those who have harassed women in the name of dowry.

programme.title: Movie - Vaa Mahale Vaa
programme.desc: Lawyer Uma takes up the case of Raman, a mechanic who has been framed for murder. She soon learns that the prime suspect is her own father, Vishwanath, whom she has always held in high esteem.

programme.title: Movie - Paayum Puli (New)
programme.desc: When an extortion gang spreads terror in Madurai, ACP Jayasheelan is assigned to bring an end to their wrongdoing. However, he is unaware that the mastermind of the crimes is someone close to him.

programme.title: Movie - Jalli Kattu
programme.desc: Arjun wishes to avenge the murder of his family, but is caught by the police and placed under house arrest. However, the judge decides to help Arjun on his path to vengeance.

programme.title: Movie - Pattas
programme.desc: A young man is separated from his mother at an early age and becomes a petty thief. However, he soon realises his past and decides to learn an ancient form of martial arts to defeat an old foe.

programme.title: Movie - Alli Arjuna
programme.desc: Arivu lives with his friends in an old bungalow whose owner is fondly known as 'Daddy' and runs an eatery. Soon, Savitri enters his life after he offers to help her when her groom disappears.

programme.title: Movie - Pillaiyar Theru Kadasi Veedu
programme.desc: Ganesan loves Sandhya, but fatefully his marriage is arranged with Valli, his uncle's daughter. When he learns that Sandhya is terminally ill, he marries her and earns the wrath of his family.

programme.title: Movie - Singara Chittu
programme.desc: Murali marries Raji against the wishes of his mother. Worsening conditions force him to move out with his wife and kid. All plans to begin life anew come to a halt due to an unexpected turn of events.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Looty
programme.desc: Childless couple Rasappa and Geetha adopt a child abandoned in their car. However, problems ensue when Geetha suspects her husband to be the biological father of the child.

programme.title: Movie - Sri Raja Rajeshwari
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Rajasthan
programme.desc: When terrorists infiltrate the Indian shores to attack the nuclear scientists, the government forms a special task force, which includes top policemen.

programme.title: Movie - Unakkagave Vazhukkiren
programme.desc: Ravi Shankar stops composing music after a tragedy occurs in his life. He meets Chitra who shares similar interests. Soon, he learns about her misery and realises he is responsible for it.

programme.title: Movie - Aanandham
programme.desc: Tirupathi, the eldest son in the family, works hard to raise his three brothers Madhavan, Kannan, and Surya. However, problems arise in the family when Madhavan's wife begins to rebel against him.

programme.title: Tie Break Tens 2026
programme.desc: Tie Break Tens is a fast-paced, knockout tennis format featuring exclusively 10-point tiebreak matches with no games or sets. The first player to reach 10 points with a two-point advantage wins the match. Introduced in 2015, it is a short-format tennis partner of the ITF often featuring top professional players

programme.title: World Matchplay Darts 2026
programme.desc: The World Matchplay is one of the most prestigious major tournaments in professional darts, organized by the Professional Darts Corporation (PDC). It is highly exclusive, restricting its field to just 32 of the world's top darts players. The event is held in the historic Empress Ballroom at the Winter Gardens in Blackpool, England.

programme.title: ATP Tour Review Show 2026
programme.desc: A look back at the world class tennis action at the Jockey Club Brasileiro in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.

programme.title: ATP Tour Review Show 2026
programme.desc: A look back from the largest ATP Tour venue in Latin America at the Arena GNP Seguros.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Nordea Open, historically known as the Swedish Open, is a professional tennis tournament held annually in the coastal town of Bastad, Sweden. Established in 1948, the event is highly celebrated by athletes for its exceptional hospitality and seaside atmosphere.

programme.title: ATP Tour: This Week 2026
programme.desc: This programme tells the story of the ATP tour, its tournaments, personalities behind the tennis, funny feature content and much more.

programme.title: Heroines 2026
programme.desc: Heroines is a timeless series, that tables important discussion that challenges the status quo and celebrates the unique values of women’s sport. Each episode features a dedicated theme such as equality, maternity, leadership, mental health, fan engagement, activism and more, supported by exclusive interviews with leaders at the forefront of women’s sport.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Iasi Open is an annual professional tennis tournament held in Iași, Romania. Taking place at the Baza Sportiva Circ, the event is played on outdoor clay courts. The first WTA edition of the competition saw Mirra Andreeva become singles champion.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Swiss Open is an annual, professional men's tennis tournament held in the resort village of Gstaad, Switzerland. It is the eighth-oldest tennis tournament in the world, having been founded in 1915.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Croatia Open is a men's professional tennis tournament held annually in the coastal town of Umag, Croatia. Founded in 1990, it is the oldest tennis tournament in Croatia.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Athens Open is a WTA 250 event that will be played at the Stadion Sports Center. It marks the first time a WTA event has been held in the city since 1990, when the Athens Trophy was last staged.

programme.title: World Matchplay Darts 2026
programme.desc: The World Matchplay is one of the most prestigious major tournaments in professional darts, organized by the Professional Darts Corporation (PDC). It is highly exclusive, restricting its field to just 32 of the world's top darts players. The event is held in the historic Empress Ballroom at the Winter Gardens in Blackpool, England.

programme.title: ASO Marathon Programming 2026
programme.desc: The Schneider Electric Marathon de Paris is one of the world's largest and most popular road races, featuring over 50,000 participants from 110 countries. The race course starts on the Champs-Élysées and finishes near Avenue Foch.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Upper Austria Ladies Linz is a professional women's tennis tournament in the WTA Tour, first held in 1987. It is held at the Design Center Linz in Austria, featuring top-ranked players on indoor surfaces.

programme.title: World Matchplay Darts 2026
programme.desc: The World Matchplay is one of the most prestigious major tournaments in professional darts, organized by the Professional Darts Corporation (PDC). It is highly exclusive, restricting its field to just 32 of the world's top darts players. The event is held in the historic Empress Ballroom at the Winter Gardens in Blackpool, England.

programme.title: ATP Tour Review Show 2026
programme.desc: A look back at the 34th edition of one of the most popular tournament stops of the ATP World Tour at the Dubai Duty Free Tennis Stadium.

programme.title: ATP Tour Review Show 2026
programme.desc: A look back at the 119th edition of the Monte Carlo Masters from the Monte Carlo Country Club in Roquebrune-Cap-Martin, France.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Croatia Open is a men's professional tennis tournament held annually in the coastal town of Umag, Croatia. Founded in 1990, it is the oldest tennis tournament in Croatia.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026
programme.desc: The Alula tour is an annual, professional 5-stage road cycling race in Saudi Arabia. It features elite international teams competing across the desert landscapes and historical sites of the Alula region.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Generali Open Kitzbuhel is an annual, professional men's tennis tournament held every summer in the alpine town of Kitzbuhel, Austria. programme.title: REVIEW - MON 13 APR
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 32. Friday's game sees West Ham host Wolves, Arsenal welcome Bournemouth, Liverpool take on Fulham, and Manchester United close out the round against Leeds United.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 4
programme.desc: Soaring Seagulls' tells the incredible story of Brighton & Hove Albion; from the brink of collapse and years in the lower leagues to becoming one of the Premier League's smartest and most admired clubs. Featuring interviews with the key figures behind Brighton's rise, alongside celebrity fans who followed every twist along the way, this documentary charts a remarkable journey of survival, ambition and one of the greatest comebacks in modern football.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 5
programme.desc: One year on from the tragic death of Diogo Jota and his brother Andre in a car accident, this deeply emotional PL Stories show celebrates the life of one of football's most loved figures. Through interviews with friends, teammates and coaches from Portugal to the Premier League, we look back on Jota's journey, the impact he had on those around him, and the legacy he left behind both on and off the pitch.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 6
programme.desc: We spend the day with Dean Ashton as he reflects on a career that promised so much and was cut short far too soon. From his rise through the Football League to becoming one of the Premier League's most exciting forwards with West Ham United, Ashton looks back on the goals, injuries and moments that shaped his journey in the game. Now working as a respected pundit, we see how his passion and understanding of football continue to drive him long after retirement.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 7
programme.desc: We take a trip down memory lane to revisit the incredible story of Norwich City's unforgettable 1992-93 season; the campaign that saw an unfancied side come within touching distance of becoming the first-ever Premier League champions. Through interviews with the players and staff who lived it, we relive the pressure, drama and defining moments of a nerve-shredding title battle with Manchester United that could have changed English football history forever.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 49
programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray. programme.title: PL MASTERCLASS - EP 3
programme.desc: Some of the Premier League's biggest stars take us onto the pitch to discuss the techniques and thought processes that allow them to perform at the highest level. Featuring Brian Brobbey, Alex Scott, Jeremy Doku and Bruno Fernandes.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 5
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage. Featuring Rodri, Viktor Gyökeres, Chris Wood and Daniel Munoz.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Tshilumba Mikixi vs. August Kayambala
programme.desc: In this episode Tshilomba 'The Old Monkey' Mikixi takes on August 'The Barista' Kayambala in a lightweight clash.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Darren Barker
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing, historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features middleweights Sergio 'Maravilla' Martinez (47-2, 26 KOs) vs. 'Dazzling' Darren Barker (23-0, 14 KOs) from Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on October 1, 2011. An 11th round knockout decided this bout between 2 of the top 4 contenders in the deep middleweight class.

programme.title: FS WCK Brandol Mendoza vs. Romain Crozet
programme.desc: Experience the intensity of World Championship Kickboxing with the WCK Muay Thai Rules series, bringing elite international fighters into the spotlight for non-stop action. From explosive knockouts and technical battles to the electrifying atmosphere that has made Muay Thai one of the fastest-growing combat sports in the world, every bout delivers the excitement of world-class kickboxing. Featuring rising stars and seasoned champions, catch all of the power, precision, and heart of WCK Muay Thai

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 4, from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Shodai, Asanoyama, Hokutofuji and Takanosho.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Carlos Quintana
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (33-0, 24 KOs) defending his WBO welterweight title against the dangerous Carlos 'El Indio' Quintana (24-1, 19 KOs). The February 9, 2008 fight, at the Pechanga Resort & Casino in Temecula, California, USA, was a bloody brawl that ends with a suprising unanimous decisio

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Andre Berto vs. Miguel Rodriguez
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated Andre Berto (21-0, 18 KOs) battling Miguel Angel Rodriguez, aka 'Miki', (29-2, 23 KOs)i for the vacant WBC Welterweight Title from the FedEx Forum in Memphis, Tennessee, USA on June 21, 2008. Bonus coverage includes Chris 'The Nightmare' Arreola (23-0, 21 KOs) vs. Chazz Witherspoon (23-0, 15 KOs).

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Weapons as well as Girl's Forms and Team Demo highlights.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Keith Thurman vs Orlando Lora
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the undefeated Keith Thurman facing off with Orlando Lora. A left hook and right uppercut combination ends this fight. Also on the card, action from former heavyweight champion James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: Highlights from the 26th Karate Senior World Championships as top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, all converged on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode is highlighted by a heartfelt interview with the legendary MMA Hall of Famer Tito Ortiz that shows you sides of the former champ you never knew from his childhood to his love of fishing to the man he is today. We stop by "Cowboy" Donald Cerrone's ranch to see you don't need the flashiest training equipment to be a world class fighter. Plus Nate Marquardt gets his dream car and UFC ring girls bring us on a tour of a new gym.

programme.title: FS MMA Dan Evensen vs. Jeremiah Constant
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Dan Evensen fights Jeremiah 'Hacksaw' Constant. Constant is a game opponent and looks to make his mark against Evenson in Costa Rica.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 12
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 13
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 14
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa­Laa and Po want to go outside but it's raining. Some wellies and umbrellas magically appear and the Teletubbies go outside for splashy, rainy fun.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are back together like you've never seen them before!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 46
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 47
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 1
programme.desc: Bluey is excited to get her own room. But when bed time comes, she misses Bingo more than she expected and must find a way to stay in touch with her sister.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 2
programme.desc: Mum sets up a backyard obstacle course just for fun, but Dad wants to race! Now the kids are determined to win by any means necessary.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 4
programme.desc: In Brazil, Thomas meets two wood-burning engines who've never travelled beyond their eucalyptus railway.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 5
programme.desc: When a Pretend Emergency turns into a Real Emergency, there's only one engine who can save the day.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 6
programme.desc: There's a fancy dress competition on the railways and while Thomas and the others are excited, Shankar doesn't want to join in.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 4
programme.desc: Glitch takes Tala to the continent of Africa to help her with an Academy project. When the pair get lost, the Go Jetters need to crack the clues and find them in this huge continent.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 5
programme.desc: When Tala bases her class project on her uncle's travels, the Go Jetters swing into action and help Grandmaster Glitch take his own souvenir selfies across the continent of Europe.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 6
programme.desc: When Glitch and Kyan race to the south pole, Glitch's loyal Grimbots steal the pole's marker to help Glitch win.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Nori and Preston are creating a circle of standing stones, just like the ancients of Swoppiton used to make. The stones are big - will it take more than Mojo's crane top to move them?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: Preston is in costume as everyone's favourite character, Dewey Dragon, but he isn't ready for how demanding Dewey's fans are. Mojo and Bo need to help him escape the crowd.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 32
programme.desc: Evil Pea builds her own Evil Peamobile - and it has more gadgets than the Tatocar! It's Carrot's job to make the Tatocar even better before the two cars to go head-to-head.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 31
programme.desc: Supertato and Runner Bean are competing for first place in this year's supermarket race, but Evil Pea has plans to win by cheating.

programme.title: Supertato Songs S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Supertato and the Tato Team have a veggie birthday song for you. Sing and dance along!

programme.title: Supertato Songs S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Evil Pea is tired of everyone always cheering for Supertato. In this song she looks at all the things that make Supertato super, but realises that she loves being evil!

programme.title: Supertato Songs S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: It's tough being one of Evil Pea's hench cobs, so Corn and Cob have a song to tell us all about it.

programme.desc: Happy discovers his wobbly tooth has come out, but he's lost it! He's having a problem remembering where he was when it fell out. The squirrels start to look for it but they can't find the tooth anywhere. Time to think carefully and remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 25
programme.desc: The Squirrels are rushing around, so Duggee shows them how to enjoy things at a slower pace. However, they come across Tortoise who needs to get to the hospital as his wife is having babies. Duggee and the Squirrels need to get him there fast!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 26
programme.desc: It's time for the annual Animal Obstacle Course Race- the animals need to work together in teams to complete the course. Duggee has his Obstacle Course badge, together with the squirrels they form a team and the fun begins.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 27
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing dress up when they hear a ghostly sound. They can see that something has spooked the chickens, so they stop what they are doing to investigate. They come across several different items, such as ghostly white footprints, and then they spot a floating sheet. What is going on? The Squirrels will have to take the long way round if they want to catch whatever it is.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 47
programme.desc: Bluey needs her Mum's advice on dealing with a troublesome neighbour, when the serenity of her couch cushion playhouse is threatened by Bingo's own growing stable of animals.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 48

programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout jet off in the Explorer, embarking on a global adventure to Kenya in search of spotted hyenas. They discover how hyenas use a secret body language to communicate.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to the Amazon rainforest on a global adventure to discover how scarlet macaw chicks get the vital salt in their diet they need to survive. Along the way, Andy meets a poison dart frog and takes to the skies on a scarlet macaw.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 91
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-­Laa follow a trail of muddy footprints and find Po in bed with very muddy feet. The Noo-­Noo cleans off the mud.

programme.desc: Felix the pig is stuck on a cliff ledge where not even Mojo's tops can reach him. They will need to be creative to get Bo up there and save that poor pig!

programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 5

programme.desc: When Bluey accidentally makes Bingo upset playing a game at dinner, she will do anything to make her happy again - even changing the rules of the game. But nothing seems to work.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions S01 - EP 10
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen and Scout head to Australia on a baby animal mission to solve the mystery of why a group of kangaroos, and their joeys, are living on a beach. Along the way, Andy is chased by a pack of dingoes and hops to safety with the baby kangaroos.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Bella and Lift are visited by a shining star and set off to explore the floors of Playtime Towers. The first stop is Sketch in Boxtropolis - what will she be making today?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 31
programme.desc: The Squirrels are inspired to learn how to sing a cappella style after hearing a famous bird quartet singing in a nearby tree.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 30
programme.desc: When the Squirrels see Duggee practicing his impressive Topiary skills they are keen to try some of their own - and promptly put their new talents into practice in order to tame some very wild woods!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 29
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn what a favourite is, but have trouble deciding what their own favourite things are, so they make a film asking some of their friends what is special to them to help narrow it down.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 42
programme.desc: While clearing up the Academy farm after a heavy storm, the Go Jetters wish they could keep the plants above water. Glitch remembers a place where the farmers do just that - Bangladesh, where many farmers grow their crops on wooden platforms to avoid floods in the monsoon season. Glitch, Tala, Lars and Foz head to Bangladesh to see these floating farms, but after the Grimbots accidentally knock the Grimmer into a raft, Tala and a local farmer are swept into a nearby river! Glitch and the Go Jett

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: Xuli, Lars and Glitch argue over whose vehicle is the best; the Vroomster, the Truckster or the Grimbler. Kyan suggests the only way to settle the argument is a race. A sudden waterspout helps Glitch take an early lead, but Ubercorn warns them about the much larger tornadic waterspouts that can sometimes appear. When the weather turns, Glitch and the Go Jetters find themselves in trouble. Can they get to safety before a huge tornado hits the island?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 9
programme.desc: It's Friday the 13th in Italy and Thomas tries to improve his luck by following Lorenzo and Beppe's advice on superstitions.

programme.desc: The Shallots want to explore beyond the front garden, so Sarah comes up with a plan.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S02 - EP 2
programme.desc: After getting muddy, Umbrella has to brave his fear of getting wet and take his first bath!

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: Stanley has to free Myrtle, who is stuck, using his new tunnelling mole machine so she can attend the schools tree planting day.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Stanley has to fix Myrtles wobbly sofa so her and her friends can watch Fred and Fifi on the Boogie Woogie Dance Show together. He ends up creating a super-duper special sofa.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: The talking animals chat about all the good and bad things about having a brother or a sister.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S02 - EP 20
programme.desc: On a hot summer day, JoJo, Gran Gran and their friends are painting the fence around the community garden. JoJo and Gran Gran decide to buy ice lollies from Jared's shop, only to find he has run out! Instead, they buy fruit, and JoJo soon realises that ice lollies can be made at home by freezing fruit juice.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 10
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.desc: King Tiger interrupts the Squirrels' quiet time when he turns up to the Clubhouse with a magic hat on instead of his crown.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S04 - EP 7

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch's digging floods Wieliczka Salt mine. The Go Jetters must save the famous salt statues.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 4

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 91
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-­Laa follow a trail of muddy footprints and find Po in bed with very muddy feet. The Noo-­Noo cleans off the mud.

programme.desc: Messy has to save OKIDO from a falling comet before his bedtime! He sees that Mayor Oki still has his bath!

programme.desc: Felix the pig is stuck on a cliff ledge where not even Mojo's tops can reach him. They will need to be creative to get Bo up there and save that poor pig!

programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 14
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 38
programme.desc: When Xuli's 'Academy Ace' flying trophy goes missing, Jetpad tracks it to Caernarfon Castle in Wales, where Grandmaster Glitch has locked himself and the trophy inside, to keep it safe. programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: On a picnic in the park, Bluey and her friends play Shadowlands. Coco keeps taking shortcuts so Bluey has to show her that following the rules can make the game more fun.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 7
programme.desc: When Bluey accidentally makes Bingo upset playing a game at dinner, she will do anything to make her happy again - even changing the rules of the game. But nothing seems to work.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 27
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 28
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions S01 - EP 10
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen and Scout head to Australia on a baby animal mission to solve the mystery of why a group of kangaroos, and their joeys, are living on a beach. Along the way, Andy is chased by a pack of dingoes and hops to safety with the baby kangaroos.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Bella and Lift are visited by a shining star and set off to explore the floors of Playtime Towers. The first stop is Sketch in Boxtropolis - what will she be making today?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 31
programme.desc: The Squirrels are inspired to learn how to sing a cappella style after hearing a famous bird quartet singing in a nearby tree.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 30
programme.desc: When the Squirrels see Duggee practicing his impressive Topiary skills they are keen to try some of their own - and promptly put their new talents into practice in order to tame some very wild woods!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 29
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn what a favourite is, but have trouble deciding what their own favourite things are, so they make a film asking some of their friends what is special to them to help narrow it down.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 42
programme.desc: While clearing up the Academy farm after a heavy storm, the Go Jetters wish they could keep the plants above water. Glitch remembers a place where the farmers do just that - Bangladesh, where many farmers grow their crops on wooden platforms to avoid floods in the monsoon season. Glitch, Tala, Lars and Foz head to Bangladesh to see these floating farms, but after the Grimbots accidentally knock the Grimmer into a raft, Tala and a local farmer are swept into a nearby river! Glitch and the Go Jett

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: Xuli, Lars and Glitch argue over whose vehicle is the best; the Vroomster, the Truckster or the Grimbler. Kyan suggests the only way to settle the argument is a race. A sudden waterspout helps Glitch take an early lead, but Ubercorn warns them about the much larger tornadic waterspouts that can sometimes appear. When the weather turns, Glitch and the Go Jetters find themselves in trouble. Can they get to safety before a huge tornado hits the island?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 9
programme.desc: It's Friday the 13th in Italy and Thomas tries to improve his luck by following Lorenzo and Beppe's advice on superstitions.

programme.desc: The Shallots want to explore beyond the front garden, so Sarah comes up with a plan.

programme.desc: Stanley has to free Myrtle, who is stuck, using his new tunnelling mole machine so she can attend the schools tree planting day.

programme.desc: Stanley has to fix Myrtles wobbly sofa so her and her friends can watch Fred and Fifi on the Boogie Woogie Dance Show together. He ends up creating a super-duper special sofa.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: The talking animals chat about all the good and bad things about having a brother or a sister.

Instead, they buy fruit, and JoJo soon realises that ice lollies can be made at home by freezing fruit juice.

programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 37
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo need Ted's help to pull a wobbly duck statue up Swoppiton Hill. But does Ted know the best way? And will there be anything left of the duck when they get there?

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 16
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 15
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. "If only we had more Duggee's" muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 39
programme.desc: Glitch finds a map in his Uncle Grimbeard's pirate chest and embarks on a treasure hunt. Meanwhile, The Go Jetters arrive at the Great Barrier Reef in Australia to enjoy this amazing underwater ecosystem. As they dive down to the peaceful reef, Glitch sails overhead. Huge oars from his GrimHQ pirate ship splash through the water damaging the delicate coral. This is definitely not cool and there's only one way to stop Grand-Pirate Glitch: to the Vroomster! The Go Jetters ask Glitch to stop before

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: At the weekend, Bluey and Bingo are playing in the garden with Dad. But Bingo gets upset when she discovers a walking leaf insect and Dad doesn't notice.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 8
programme.desc: Dad refuses to be late dropping off Bluey and Bingo at kindy and school, but the girls make Dad play so many games, they quickly derail his plan.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 28
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 29
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions S01 - EP 11
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Malaysia, South East Asia on a baby animal mission to find out why new born dusky leaf monkeys look so different to their parents.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Bella plays with her favourite cup - it makes the perfect drum for a sing along with Lift. Together, they visit Kingsley and Queenie who play the 'Tea Party Dash', but who will win?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 33
programme.desc: Duggee has a job to do outside of the Clubhouse. But who will look after the Squirrels? King Tiger of course, he has his Babysitting Badge. But then the Squirrels end up babysitting King Tiger!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 31
programme.desc: The Squirrels are inspired to learn how to sing a cappella style after hearing a famous bird quartet singing in a nearby tree.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 30
programme.desc: When the Squirrels see Duggee practicing his impressive Topiary skills they are keen to try some of their own - and promptly put their new talents into practice in order to tame some very wild woods!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 43
programme.desc: After Glitch accidentally destroys part of the Academy, he and Ubercorn have a huge argument. When he heads to Grim HQ to make amends, Ubercorn is accidentally trapped as Glitch heads to the most remote place on earth: Point Nemo, in the middle of the Pacific Ocean. With the help of some friendly astronauts, Glitch and Ubercorn try to get a message to the Go Jetters before Grim HQ sinks to the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 42
programme.desc: While clearing up the Academy farm after a heavy storm, the Go Jetters wish they could keep the plants above water. Glitch remembers a place where the farmers do just that - Bangladesh, where many farmers grow their crops on wooden platforms to avoid floods in the monsoon season. Glitch, Tala, Lars and Foz head to Bangladesh to see these floating farms, but after the Grimbots accidentally knock the Grimmer into a raft, Tala and a local farmer are swept into a nearby river! Glitch and the Go Jett

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 10
programme.desc: Thomas is in Australia where racing car Ace is planning a big jump across lots of buses.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S02 - EP 2
programme.desc: After getting muddy, Umbrella has to brave his fear of getting wet and take his first bath!

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S02 - EP 3
programme.desc: A search for shade on a hot day leads Sarah and Duck to discover a fascinating tower in the park.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The cicrus bus has broken down, but the children are waiting for a circus show! Can Stanley help out?

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: Stanley has to free Myrtle, who is stuck, using his new tunnelling mole machine so she can attend the schools tree planting day.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: From tickles and piggybacks to no longer being able to do cartwheels, grandparents are brilliant!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S02 - EP 21
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran celebrate Diwali, the festival of light, with their friends Raya and Nirada. It's a very exciting celebration, with lots of yummy food, diyas, music and, of course, lights! Raya teaches JoJo how to make a rangoli. And when Raya doesn't like the loud sounds coming from the fireworks, JoJo has a plan to help her friend!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 13
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S04 - EP 9
programme.desc: The Squirrels are having fun playing games but are surprised to find out that Betty didn't always enjoy playing. Since her first day at Squirrel Club, she always impressed everyone with her confidence and independence, but at first she didn't know how to join in with the others. Luckily, Duggee had a great idea to bring all the Squirrels together.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S04 - EP 8
programme.desc: King Tiger interrupts the Squirrels' quiet time when he turns up to the Clubhouse with a magic hat on instead of his crown.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.desc: A Giant Grandmaster Glitch means BIG trouble for the Giant's Causeway - can the Go Jetters stop him in his tracks?

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: It's Ball-entine’s Day, the day when the dogs of Pawston show their affection for each other by exchanging balls. programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 1

programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: There are some strongholds built to protect the sacred. But there are others used for more sinister purposes. In this episode, we uncover the stories behind some of the world's most imposing structures.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24) - EP 617
programme.desc: When a seller whips into the shop with an 'Energy Dome' hat made for the band DEVO, will Rick's offer top the charts? Then, Corey takes a shot at a decanter set that supposedly belonged to Buffalo Bill.

programme.title: The Pickers (S26) - EP 399
programme.desc: In L.A., Mike and Robbie head back to a fifth-generation demo business and junkyard that's piled so deep that most of its treasures are out of reach.

programme.title: The Taiwan Way - EP 5
programme.desc: Brimming with a perspective of Taiwanese cuisine, Chris returns to his restaurant, Yumpling, based in New York. Joined by Yumpling's co-founders, Chris dives into the stories behind Yumpling's creations.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: From Lionel Trains to video games, for the right collector, our childhood toys can be worth millions! Over the last decades, people have paid some truly outrageous prices for the toys they always wanted.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S5) - EP 6
programme.desc: A scientist and businessman team up to develop a vitamin C-rich war ration for the troops fighting in World War 2, which unexpectedly leads to the development of frozen concentrated orange juice.

programme.title: Ride n' Seek With Jaime Dempsey (S5) - EP 5
programme.desc: Jaime needs to reach the airport in Coron, but first, she must scale a cliff, dive for wrecks and get past a herd of stubborn cows.

programme.title: Ride n' Seek With Jaime Dempsey (S5) - EP 6
programme.desc: Jaime arrives in Batanes and is introduced to the unique culture of the Ivatan tribe with a mad dash for a cow!

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S3) - EP 6
programme.desc: From a coastal cleanup plan that ends with an earth-shaking surprise to a fugitive's fiery fix for an unexpected problem, these are the real-life moments when people thought way outside the box.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: From ancient religious texts buried in Egypt to cultural relics found at sea, or even a tower of skulls hiding under the earth—these lost artefacts change what we thought we knew about certain beliefs.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S5) - EP 3
programme.desc: Most people know it as the biblical birthplace of man. But is the Garden of Eden really just a story to explain creation? Or could it be a real place? And if it did exist—where exactly was it?

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks - EP 17
programme.desc: The Pacific campaign reaches a brutal and bloody fever pitch from 1944 to 1945.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks - EP 18
programme.desc: The war in Europe reaches a climax as Allied armies advance towards Berlin, and Hitler orders his people to fight to the last man.

programme.title: Special Forces (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: From a Tarzan assault course towering 10m above ground to a 160km forced march, recruits of Malaysian Army Special Forces unit, Grup Gerak Khas, are pushed to their limits to earn the coveted Green Beret.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: The team zeroes in on the island of Bermuda—namesake of the Triangle—and one of the most infamous mysteries that helped establish the dark reputation of these waters.

programme.title: Swamp People (S14) - EP 10
programme.desc: Pickle teams up with Jacob, and it's almost like being on vacation. Zak tries to make up for a crucial mistake. Bruce ventures into uncharted territory. Ashley sets her sights on monstrous land gators.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape - EP 6
programme.desc: On his last day as an undercover agent, Bergen County Detective Carlos James experiences his first shootout, and ATF Agent Jenn Eskew poses as a hitwoman to investigate a possible murder for hire.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Lake Ozark PD Detective Sergeant Mark Kordula must remove a rowdy woman causing trouble at one of the bars, but the real trouble begins back at the station when her flirtations kick into overdrive.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: The murder of a charismatic salesman exposes a volatile relationship driven by obsession and jealousy, leading investigators to a former lover willing to kill rather than let go.

programme.title: First Blood (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Growing up gay in the hyper-masculine Bayou was tough on Ronald Dominique. An inability to connect and a prison sexual assault would cement his decision to ultimately kill his first victim.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Exotic animal dealer William 'Wild Bill' Zelenski is accused of murdering his girlfriend's 18-year-old son, Ryelee Manente-Powell, after he stole $27,000 worth of venomous and exotic reptiles.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Series - EP 5
programme.desc: Chilling accounts of children in danger and the people who fought to protect them. Stories of children who experienced the unthinkable: six girls hunted and murdered in their neighbourhoods; and more.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson - EP 2
programme.desc: After years of torment, Nicole files for divorce, embarking on a new chapter that includes a risky affair with one of OJ's close friends. But a failed reconciliation led Nicole to a final, fatal stand.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9) - EP 8
programme.desc: When one of Redlands, California's newest residents goes missing, the distraught community bands together to help find her.

programme.title: Partners In Crime (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Taiwan's prolific Polygraph Examiner, Huang Meng Lung, has helped crack countless cases by determining whether a person is lying.

programme.title: Partners In Crime (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Forensic handwriting examiner SC Leung shows us how to distinguish between unique writing styles and a fraud.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 1
programme.desc: When the body of free-spirited Bonnie Ruphard, 47, is spotted by a runner in Lafayette, LA, police suspect domestic violence.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Bad decisions cause people to get booked in, including a first-timer that resisted arrest for riding their bicycle on the wrong side of the road, a couple that had half a pound of meth.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam - EP 15
programme.desc: A shooting suspect begins cutting himself with a pocket knife after investigators leave him alone in the interrogation room; a woman breaks down after telling police that she drowned her grandmother.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam - EP 16
programme.desc: A man breaks down sobbing after admitting to stabbing his mom; an actress tells detectives how and why she shot her estranged uncle; a suspected murderer tries to broker an immunity deal; and more.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died - EP 10
programme.desc: When a witness sees a nightclub owner jump to his death from his fifth-floor condo, the case is seemingly open and shut; that is until Dr. Jennifer Nara's autopsy reveals shocking new evidence.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks - EP 3
programme.desc: When teens Llianna Adank and Eric Goldstrand are found shot to death at an Oregon park in 1977, every parent's nightmare comes true.

programme.title: Hoarders (S14) - EP 7
programme.desc: Andy has worked odd jobs his entire adult life, and he considers himself an entrepreneur specialising in the reselling of scrap and junk.

programme.title: Crime In Progress - EP 3
programme.desc: When a respected Cleveland doctor goes missing, a chilling investigation into his fractured family explodes into a 12-hour standoff and a brutal truth that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st - EP 8
programme.desc: Police are hard-pressed to find solid leads when a 19-year-old girl vanishes without a trace.

programme.desc: A violent assault ends in a fatal stabbing when a young mother kills her boyfriend to defend her child. Considered innocent by police for four years, she was re-arrested and faces up to 41 years in prison.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 2
programme.desc: In 1991 Curtis "Cochise" Smith, 29, heads out for diapers in Plaquemine, Louisiana, and vanishes. Twenty-five years later, a body surfaces in the bayou, and Cochise's murder case reignites.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2) - EP 14
programme.desc: At the scene of a chilling triple murder in Northern Maine, detectives recover DNA evidence that suggests an out-of-town visitor may be behind the brutal crime.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: After a deceased baby is found hidden in a cardboard box, investigators question the mother and her estranged husband to figure out who is responsible for this horrific crime.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson - EP 3
programme.desc: After Nicole’s murder, OJ's behaviour grows increasingly erratic and bizarre. Placed squarely in the LAPD's crosshairs as the prime suspect, he leads them on a slow-speed chase down the 405.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: After rideshare driver Carolina Vargas drove a nice stranger to his hotel, she didn't have qualms about giving him another ride. But her trusting gesture turned tragic.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception - EP 2
programme.desc: Matheau Moore sits down for a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo. Though he was found not guilty of murdering his wife, suspicions still follow him—even among those closest to the case.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception - EP 3
programme.desc: Edward Ates takes a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo in a bid to show his innocence. He spent 20 years behind bars for the murder of his neighbour—a crime he says he didn’t commit.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers (S9) - EP 3
programme.desc: It's a wild Alaska summer day as troopers locate a naked wolf hunter, track a suspected felon through the woods, and respond to an animal hoarder in a remote village just north of the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: A man in Modesto was apprehended by a K9 unit while fleeing from police; another was arrested while his family dog was bleeding in their backyard.

programme.title: Griff's Great American South S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Griff explores Charleston's charm, Civil War history, and the legacy of slavery that shaped the Old South.

programme.title: Earth S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: When Earth first formed from clouds of dust and gas 4.6 billion years ago, it was - like so many other lifeless worlds in the universe - devoid of an atmosphere, an inhospitable rock floating in the black void of space. But as the young planet is pummelled by asteroids, a period of extraordinary upheaval begins.

programme.title: The Great Wall with Ash Dykes S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Ash Dykes ventures near Beijing, spotlighting wildlife conservation in Mutianyu before visiting Shixia village, where locals preserve sections of the Great Wall. At Jiankou, he explores how technology aids restoration, then confronts the treacherous Eagles Neck climb, embodying courage and determination in his quest to protect history and nature.

programme.title: Griff's Great American South S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Griff explores Charleston's charm, Civil War history, and the legacy of slavery that shaped the Old South.

programme.title: Ben Fogle's Chinese Adventure S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Ben dives into rural China's epic story, embarking on a journey of wonder across Sichuan and Yunnan: taking in Taoism, a search for the giant panda, travel by bullet train, rice terraces and tea mountains.

programme.title: Earth S01 - EP 4

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather S06 - EP 5
programme.desc: Extreme temperatures fuel wildfires on England's east coast, leaving rescue teams overrun.

programme.title: Big Little Journeys S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: A tiny chameleon faces the journey of a lifetime in a Madagascan forest, and a water vole in Scotland swims across a loch and scales a mountain to find new territory and a mate.

programme.title: Great Asian Railway Journeys S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Michael Portillo steps into the ring under the guidance of champion trainer Master Toddy to learn muay Thai boxing. Can he perfect the cobra-inspired right hook?

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather S06 - EP 5
programme.desc: Extreme temperatures fuel wildfires on England's east coast, leaving rescue teams overrun.

programme.title: Planet Earth III S03 - EP 7
programme.desc: Discover the extraordinary ways in which wildlife survives in a rapidly changing human world. From cobras hunting in houses to macaques stealing mobile phones to barter with.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7 S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Lion numbers continue to grow, but there's not enough food to go around; a lioness mum risks her life to feed her five cubs; Xudum's newborn leopard cubs face a deadly threat.

programme.title: Great Asian Railway Journeys S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Michael Portillo steps into the ring under the guidance of champion trainer Master Toddy to learn muay Thai boxing. Can he perfect the cobra-inspired right hook?

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather S06 - EP 5
