programme.title: Ben Fogle's Chinese Adventure S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Ben dives into rural China's epic story, embarking on a journey of wonder across Sichuan and Yunnan: taking in Taoism, a search for the giant panda, travel by bullet train, rice terraces and tea mountains.

programme.title: Big Little Journeys S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: A tiny chameleon faces the journey of a lifetime in a Madagascan forest, and a water vole in Scotland swims across a loch and scales a mountain to find new territory and a mate.

programme.title: Michael Portillo's Long Weekends S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Michael's first day in Lisbon starts with riding the iconic Route 28 tram. Next he savors unique Portuguese cuisine, encounters passionate peacocks, experiences the soul of Fado music, and uncovers the tragic history of the Portuguese monarchy.

programme.title: The Mating Game S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Jungles are home to 80% of all species but they cover just 2% of the planet. When animals in these crowded forests want to mate, the challenge is how to stand out from the crowd.

programme.title: The Great Wall with Ash Dykes S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: In the next phase of Ash Dykes' adventure, he sets out to explore one of the oldest Great Walls at Zhangjiakou, fortified by eight consecutive dynasties. Along the way, there's a brief detour to carve up the fresh powder on the black runs at Chongli. Dykes then immerses himself in the footsteps of centuries-old explorers at Wulouggou before tracing the Great Wall to its intersection with the Yellow River-a symbolic convergence of Chinese history and nature.

programme.title: Solar System S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Professor Brian Cox explores the solar system's frozen worlds. He meets the dwarf planet where mountains of solid ice float across the surface, the black and white moon painted with frost, and a world illuminated by a strange form of ice. In the far reaches of the solar system, ice behaves in unimaginable ways and may have even created habitats for alien life.

Along the way, there's a brief detour to carve up the fresh powder on the black runs at Chongli. Dykes then immerses himself in the footsteps of centuries-old explorers at Wulouggou before tracing the Great Wall to its intersection with the Yellow River-a symbolic convergence of Chinese history and nature.

programme.title: Michael Portillo's Long Weekends S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: Michael's Lisbon adventure: He explores the Belem Tower, dines in a lavish 18th-century palace, and discovers a secret Chinese restaurant hidden within the city. He also enjoys local delicacies, from goosefoot barnacles to president-approved pastries.

programme.title: Wild Japan S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: In the far south west of Japan, there is a chain of islands stretching towards the tropics - a place where all life is influenced by the power of the sea, and where volcanoes and typhoons are forces to be reckoned with. The journey begins at an island at the top of the chain and travels south, revealing unexpected stories of isolation, unique wildlife and unsolved mysteries.

programme.title: Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles S02 - EP 5
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels from the Alps to the Adriatic in another entertaining railway adventure as he journeys by train through the breath-taking scenery of Slovenia and Croatia.

programme.title: Earth S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: Today, Earth is a human world, home to eight billion people and counting. Humans now have a greater effect in shaping Earth's surface than many natural processes. Chris Packham explores how dramatic twists in Earth's story enabled humans to go from being part of nature to controlling it and what can be learnt from this epic tale before it's too late.

programme.title: Michael Portillo's Long Weekends S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: Michael's Lisbon adventure: He explores the Belem Tower, dines in a lavish 18th-century palace, and discovers a secret Chinese restaurant hidden within the city. He also enjoys local delicacies, from goosefoot barnacles to president-approved pastries.

programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite visits the iconic city, Tashkent, and gets firsthand experience of its culture, food and people.

programme.title: Xplore Egypt - EP 1
programme.desc: Cairo, the sprawling and awe-inspiring Egyptian capital, has a rich history that transcends beyond books and continues to evolve into the present.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland - EP 1
programme.desc: Robbie's journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes.

programme.title: Backpack India - EP 8
programme.desc: Sommer Shiels explores the unique landscape, the rich culture and some adventurous activities at the Rann Of Kutch.

programme.title: Bucket List - EP 2
programme.desc: Daniel Coll & Paddy Doherty enjoy treks to waterfalls, fishing and a serene beach sunset in Itoshima - a place in Kyushu which calms the soul.

programme.title: The Gypsies - EP 2
programme.desc: On a road trip across central India, Krisann and Benafsha stumble upon Maheshwar, a town where the legacy of an 18th century queen comes alive.

programme.title: City Breaks - EP 12
programme.desc: Stories of king Timur's reign and the Silk road lie in the mosaic-covered masterpieces of ancient Samarkand.

programme.title: Xplore Egypt - EP 2
programme.desc: Seep visits the vibrant-hued Nubian villages on the West Bank of the Nile, which are treasuries of one of the oldest and richest cultures of Africa.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland - EP 2
programme.desc: Robbie's adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle.

programme.title: The Gypsies - EP 3
programme.desc: Built on the backwaters of Indira Sagar Dam, the island of Hanuwantiya was designed to be a paradise for adventure lovers.

programme.title: Xplore Egypt - EP 3
programme.desc: Seep visits Luxor, where she finds herself awestruck by the grand monuments that have survived from Thebes, the capital of ancient Egypt.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland - EP 3
programme.desc: At the Highland Games in Perth, Robbie is faced with one of the most important rites of passage for a true Highlander: the caber toss.

programme.title: Bucket List - EP 3
programme.desc: Daniel Coll & Paddy Doherty find out different ways to relish Gyokuro tea, one of the highest grades of tea available in Japan, and visit its source.

programme.title: City Breaks - EP 11
programme.desc: In the madrassahs and minarets of Bukhara, Alex Outhwaite finds parts of Central Asia that have remained nearly unchanged for centuries.

programme.title: Hemsley + Hemsley - Healthy and Delicious S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Even though the Hemsley sisters enjoy healthy living, they still love baking. After stocking up on alternatives to flour such as ground almonds and coconut flour, they bake a cinnamon banana bread perfect for breakfast and ginger nut cookies for an afternoon snack. Always on the lookout for alternatives to refined sugar, Jasmine and Melissa also visit two urban beekeepers who are making raw honey with London bees.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Food Stars: Australia S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Vying for a place in the semi-final, teams must prove their ability to adapt to a global market by making Americans fall in love with Aussie staple, Vegemite.

programme.title: Jamie: Eat Yourself Healthy S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Jamie makes sustainable meatballs with two different sources of protein, celebrates all the food groups on one plate in a smoked salmon omelette, and creates a berry bubbly jelly dessert.

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals S08 - EP 2
programme.desc: The teams make 24 identical Le Petit Antoine and 24 re-invented fruit tarts, and create serenity with a Japanese-garden-inspired showpiece adorned with flavourful roll cakes.

programme.title: Listing Mauritius S01 - EP 10

While the ingenious and chocolatey BBTella delights parents when they realise it's mainly made from healthy black beans.

programme.desc: When the undisputed "King of Late Night" announced his retirement, the stage is set to find a replacement host of the successful "The Tonight Show".

programme.title: Hot Rod
programme.desc: Stuntman Rod wants to clear 15 buses in order to raise money for his stepfather's heart operation.

programme.title: Contagion
programme.desc: There is a deadly outbreak of a fatal disease and people are determined to keep it at bay.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Seth Meyers with guests Jon Bernthal and Stephanie Hsu. (US TX: 15 Jul 2026).

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Seth Meyers with guest Matt Damon. (US TX: 16 Jul 2026).

programme.title: Built for Billions
programme.desc: Uncover the twists and turns behind Alibaba’s rise - from founder Jack Ma’s meteoric ascent to how the Chinese tech giant quietly became a leader in artificial intelligence.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: A second-generation member of one of Thailand’s most prominent business families, Thapanee Techajareonvikul joins CNBC host Tania Bryer to discuss her leadership of retail and consumer goods conglomerate Berli Jucker, and life inside the TCC Group empire built by her father, spanning food and beverage, hospitality, property and finance.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon with guests Zendaya and Chrissy Metz, and musical performance. (US TX: 15 Jul 2026).

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon with guests Will Ferrell, Lupita Nyong'o and Gracie Abrams, and musical performance by Gracie Abrams. (US TX: 16 Jul 2026).

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: James Henrikson schemes to strike it rich in the North Dakota oil fields and he lets no one get in his way. Because when they do, they die.

programme.title: The Tech Download
programme.desc: Sierra CEO Clay Bavor speaks to CNBC’s Arjun Kharpal about the rise of AI agents and why customer service is emerging as one of the technology’s first real-world battlegrounds.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: The UAE is rethinking its place in the global order, walking away from OPEC after nearly 60 years while moving closer to Washington through defense, technology and investment ties. As the Iran war reshapes Gulf alliances and oil markets become harder to coordinate, Abu Dhabi’s strategy points to a broader shift: using its energy wealth to build influence beyond oil.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.desc: It’s one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates S6 - EP 4
programme.desc: A year following a group of lawyers as they sue the Department of Homeland Security and scramble to help free those arrested under Donald Trump's immigration policies.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance Radio
programme.desc: The economy and the markets are "under surveillance" as we cover the latest in finance, economics and investment. Join Tom Keene, Paul Sweeney, Lisa Mateo, Michael Barr and other guests.

programme.title: Bloomberg Intelligence
programme.desc: Bloomberg's Alix Steel and Paul Sweeney harness the power of Bloomberg Intelligence to provide in-depth research and data on more than 2,000 companies and 130 industries.

programme.title: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg BusinessWeek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the world of business and finance by harnessing the power of Bloomberg Businessweek reporters and editors.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S5 - EP 3
programme.desc: Anthropic Co-Founders Dario and Daniela Amodei (Part 1). Emily meets Anthropic co-founders Dario and Daniela Amodei for a rare, in-depth discussion of the startup's origin story.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang
programme.desc: A Bloomberg Originals series hosted by Emily Chang that goes behind the scenes with founders, influencers and innovators.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang
programme.desc: Emily Chang goes inside the world of supermodel-turned-entrepreneur Karlie Kloss to explore how she’s trying to revive magazine publishing.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S5 - EP 2
programme.desc: 23andMe Institute CEO Anne Wojcicki. Emily meets 23andMe Institute Chief Executive Officer Anne Wojcicki for a discussion of the rise, fall and rebirth of the personal genetics company.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S5 - EP 1
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets California’s First Couple, Governor Gavin Newsom and Jennifer Siebel Newsom, visiting their home in Marin County and offices in Sacramento to see how they work together.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang
programme.desc: Emily Chang sits down with Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei in a wide-ranging interview discussing his San Francisco roots, the race against OpenAI, the Pentagon standoff and AI’s endgame.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Nobel Prize-winning scientist and University of California, Berkeley, Professor Jennifer Doudna to discuss the origins of CRISPR, other breakthroughs in gene editing and what Silicon Valley gets wrong about the future of biology.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S3 - EP 3
programme.desc: Emily Chang speaks with Microsoft titans Bill Gates, Steve Ballmer and Satya Nadella about the company's journey from scrappy startup to global powerhouse.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S3 - EP 4
programme.desc: Emily Chang speaks with Microsoft titans Bill Gates, Steve Ballmer and Satya Nadella about the company's journey from scrappy startup to global powerhouse.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S3 - EP 5
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Melinda French Gates in Seattle to discuss how she's navigating her next stage as a philanthropist and investor.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S3 - EP 6
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Salesforce Co-Founder & CEO Marc Benioff to discuss the rise of AI agents and what it's like to run a very memeable global tech company.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Liquid Death was founded on the idea of breaking the norms of traditional marketing. We speak to CMO Dan Murphy about the water company's origin as a "sheep in wolf's clothing."

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: We speak with Pranav Yadav, CEO of Neuro-Insight, about the marketing intelligence his company is gleaning from neuroscience.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Lisa McKnight, Mattel's chief brand officer, has been at the forefront of reviving the iconic Barbie. Now the famous toy brand has launched itself beyond store shelves and onto the silver screen.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: McLaren Racing CEO Zak Brown discusses the technology, data and effort required to propel the McLaren brand onto the modern F1 stage and into living rooms around the globe.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Stephan Pretorious, chief technology officer of WPP, unpacks the world of generative artificial intelligence and its potential impact, both positive and negative, on marketing.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: From immersive experiences to live streaming, National Women's Soccer League Chief Marketing and Commercial Officer Julie Haddon discusses the opportunities for growing women's professional sports.

programme.title: China's Plans for an Urban Super City
programme.desc: China’s Greater Bay Area will fuse 11 cities into a megalopolis that includes Hong Kong, which Beijing hopes will become a new Silicon Valley. But the plan is part of a much larger transformation.

programme.title: The Race to Build Data Centers in Space
programme.desc: “Data centers in space” may sound like science fiction, but as the SpaceX IPO augurs a space boom, tech giants and startups are betting orbital artificial intelligence is the next frontier.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they’re far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices. Now, global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Nuclear power is attempting a comeback, but producing the necessary fuel is complex. From mining to enrichment, can new technologies and supply chains scale to power the next generation of reactors?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flooding is rising worldwide, driving a global push for climate adaptation. From tunnels to seawalls to fly farms, can these solutions keep up with accelerating global warming?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: AI’s rapid growth is pushing global energy demand skyward, forcing electrical grids to expand and modernize. Now, companies from China to Nigeria are investing in new tech to power the future.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ""living in the future"!

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation. Our exclusive features, "Tackling China", "CBA Stories", and "Beyond the Baseline", take you behind the scenes and closer to the top athletes in China, by providing a unique perspective on the top sports stories

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

programme.title: Chic Cities - EP 865
programme.desc: Covering consumer shopping information, trendy specialty stores, travel guides, and the LOHAS propositions of trendy people.

programme.title: Taiwan Criminal Files - EP 1457
programme.desc: Discuss the difficult inside story behind the news events, lead the audience to explore the development of the event from an objective perspective, and strive to enlighten the audience's new thinking.

programme.title: Travel Together - EP 640
programme.desc: A real-life working travel show, each trip is led by Dou Zhikong and Wang Chuan-yi, who are composed of a "handsome working group" of artist guests. They travel together to get away from the hustle and bustle of the city and explore the most healing rural secrets.

programme.title: Eyeshot To The Cross-Strait - EP 819
programme.desc: Discussion on cross-strait issues include: Taiwanese investment, transformation and upgrading, future trends, environmental protection and green energy, cultural and creative consumption, cultural customs, enterprise development, future potential, development trends of cross-strait film and television cooperation

programme.title: All Star Quiz Show - EP 119
programme.desc: The puzzle reality program, with the curator Sam Tseng as the knowledge gatekeeper, tests every artist star who comes to challenge the Jiugongge puzzle game. If you want to conquer the Jiugongge level, through creative association, logical reasoning, and rational analysis, you will have the opportunity to obtain wisdom stars and take away the dream prize.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 536
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.desc: More professional, richer, and more diversified car model information is shared with the audience.

programme.title: Gilded Chopsticks - EP 18
programme.desc: Ever since his childhood, KO TIN-PO (Wong Cho Lam) has tasted a variety of great delicacies, and he is capable of analyzing the food quality and authenticity once he tastes it. But, owing to the decline of his family, he ends up wandering on the street with his servant LEE WAI (Jack Wu), making a living from selling buns. Also due to his gourmet background, he gets to know a street performer KEI MO-SUET (Joey Meng), the most beautiful girl in Peking NIAN RUOBI (Nancy Wu) and teen celebrity che

programme.title: The Offliners - EP 8
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, investing in finance, real estate and commerce are down-to-earth activities, but rich heiress WONG CHI-FEI (Katy Kung) prefers getting her head in the clouds, cofounding a start-up technology company with her best friend HUI CHING-WAI (Jason Chan). A network hacking incident allows CHI-FEI to have a chance to know how capable IT genius DING SHUN-HEI (Owen Cheung) is, so she invites him to join the company.

programme.title: Heart And Greed - EP 16
programme.desc: LING LAI-YING (Louise Lee) and her husband WONG WING-CHING (Ha Yu) work hard to run their restaurant, eventually turning it into an entrepreneurial success involving real estate investing and business. LAI-YING’s younger brother LING SHING-FUNG (Bosco Wong) even tries to help them get the company listed on the stock market. Initially, WING-CHING does not agree with this. programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 38
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse. LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead.

programme.title: My Unfair Lady - EP 14
programme.desc: Career driven LING MAN (Jessica Hester Hsuan) is a property management executive with a golden touch, and the shopping malls under her leadership have won many awards. She is also a control freak. As her number one assistant, her cousin LING YU-KEN (Natalie Tong) is totally under her thumb and hard-working. She learns to flirt superficially, helping LING MAN smooth over many problems. Just as LING MAN is looking forward to moving up the company to be appointed to the board of directors, the comp

programme.title: The Airport Diary - EP 6
programme.desc: Since relocation to Chek Lap Kok in 1998, passenger traffic at Hong Kong International Airport has increased threefold in twenty-five years. And Yeung Sheung-wai (Kenneth Ma), who started out as a clerk, has been promoted to IAC Duty Manager. He is tasked with overseeing the operations of the airport. Sheung-wai also has a contingent of amicable partners, including his assistant-cum-admirer Fong Ho-yee (Rosita Kwok), Lui Chi-shan (Samantha Ko) – who handles airport passenger services – Chan Kit

programme.title: Relic Of An Emissary - EP 7
programme.desc: The founder and first emperor of the Ming Dynasty CHU YUEN-CHEUNG has passed away. CHU WAN-MAN (Chan Shan Chung), who is the son of his designated heir, is made his successor. MAN’s bodyguard NGO SIU-FUNG (Michael Tse) is ordered to search for CHEUNG’s lost will. In the course of his investigation, he gets to know the Prince of Yin CHU TAI’s (Joe Ma) counselor MA SAM-PO (Sammul Chan). FUNG and PO appreciate each other, but FUNG reminds himself not to drop his guard, as TAI is coveting the throne

programme.title: Line Walker - EP 11
programme.desc: Following the death of his co-worker, CHEUK HOI (Michael Mui) discovers that five undercover officers have lost. All of them possess confidential information. CHEUK HOI needs to find them immediately……

programme.title: Line Walker - EP 12
programme.desc: Following the death of his co-worker, CHEUK HOI (Michael Mui) discovers that five undercover officers have lost. All of them possess confidential information. CHEUK HOI needs to find them immediately……

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 38
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse. LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead.

programme.title: My Unfair Lady - EP 14
programme.desc: Career driven LING MAN (Jessica Hester Hsuan) is a property management executive with a golden touch, and the shopping malls under her leadership have won many awards. She is also a control freak. As her number one assistant, her cousin LING YU-KEN (Natalie Tong) is totally under her thumb and hard-working. She learns to flirt superficially, helping LING MAN smooth over many problems. Just as LING MAN is looking forward to moving up the company to be appointed to the board of directors, the comp

programme.title: The Airport Diary - EP 6
programme.desc: Since relocation to Chek Lap Kok in 1998, passenger traffic at Hong Kong International Airport has increased threefold in twenty-five years. And Yeung Sheung-wai (Kenneth Ma), who started out as a clerk, has been promoted to IAC Duty Manager. He is tasked with overseeing the operations of the airport. Sheung-wai also has a contingent of amicable partners, including his assistant-cum-admirer Fong Ho-yee (Rosita Kwok), Lui Chi-shan (Samantha Ko) – who handles airport passenger services – Chan Kit

programme.desc: The founder and first emperor of the Ming Dynasty CHU YUEN-CHEUNG has passed away. CHU WAN-MAN (Chan Shan Chung), who is the son of his designated heir, is made his successor. programme.title: Line Walker - EP 13
programme.desc: Following the death of his co-worker, CHEUK HOI (Michael Mui) discovers that five undercover officers have lost. All of them possess confidential information. CHEUK HOI needs to find them immediately……

programme.title: Line Walker - EP 14
programme.desc: Following the death of his co-worker, CHEUK HOI (Michael Mui) discovers that five undercover officers have lost. All of them possess confidential information. CHEUK HOI needs to find them immediately……

programme.title: The Mad Monk
programme.desc: Stephen Chow plays an arrogant god in Heaven who is being punished for his pranks and mistakes. He is sent to Earth and reincarnate as Mad Monk to change the destiny of three misguided souls - a prostitute, a beggar and a villain. The Mad Monk needs to complete the task in three days in order to return to Heaven.

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Prisoner Chi flees away under Master Zhang’s custody, causing the latter to be expelled from his clan. On his way to find Chi, Master Zhang arrives at a place where many people vanish for no reason. He soon discovers that it is Chi who captures them in his training to become a serpent demon. The war between human and demon has just begun!

programme.title: Seeding Of A Ghost
programme.desc: It's an erotic gore-fest starring Kao Fei who seeks vengeance against his wife's rapists and killers by soliciting the help of a demented magician. In return, he endures copulating dead bodies as his enemies perish in blood spurting and body exploding glory. It's one of Hong Kong goriest films ever made.

programme.title: Prince Charming
programme.desc: Chen Li Pin, the nerdy son of a business tycoon, and his friend seek love in Hawaii. Returning home in disappointment, they accidentally find themselves in a messy identity swap. It is at this time that Chen falls for a beautiful girl May, who thinks he is a company chauffeur…

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: A young girl encounters a novelist in a bar and quickly falls in love with him. However, it turns out she has fallen into a trap set up by the novelist and his ex-girlfriend who is a ghost with a disfigured face. The journey of revenge and ultimate terror has just begun!

programme.title: Faithfully Yours
programme.desc: Playboy Hong Kong Barber Happy Chan opens a fashionable new salon, right next to an old-fashioned Shanhainese barber shop. Its owner, Chuk, is furious at this development and starts a quarrel with Chan and his colleagues during the opening ceremony of his new venture Chuk's pretty daughter, Ying, is forced to keep the peace. Chan and his friends all attempt to woo Ying, but end up getting drunk and falling asleep in her bedroom. Later, Ying discovers that she is pregnant but no one can remember

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua’s hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: Mr Vampire
programme.desc: Taoist priest Kou is assigned to re-bury a rich man, in the hope that the new tomb will bring further prosperity. When the corpse turns into a vampire and wreaks havoc in the village, his disciples are also hurt by the vampire and possessed by a female ghost respectively. How can Kou save his disciples and hunt down the vampire at the same time?

programme.title: Forbidden City Cop
programme.desc: A wild and hilariously anachronistic tale of an imperial guard of the Forbidden City who has no martial arts abilities. When the emperor is abducted, he saved the day with his unusual hobby: tinkering with futuristic inventions!

programme.title: Fight Back to School II
programme.desc: Following his demotion, officer Sing resigns from the police force and goes undercover at an international school to privately investigate a terrorist plot. There, he discovers bumbling detective Tat posing as a teacher. Forced into an alliance, they team up to confront the heavily armed criminals behind the plot in a chaotic showdown.

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: Behind the Yellow Line
programme.desc: A fresh graduate, Paul, strikes up an acquaintance with a pretty young girl, Monica, on the metro. Monica is involved in a love affair with a married man while Paul is also pursued by a rich girl. When Paul vows his true love for Monica, she suggests playing hide-and-seek with him in the metro to decide if they are fated to be together.

programme.title: Unmatchable Match
programme.desc: Undercover cop Lang is assigned to befriend former triad boss Fei in order to investigate a diamond heist masterminded by the ruthless gangster Big Mad. When the deal goes awry and the diamonds end up in Fei’s possession, Big Mad comes after them with a vengeance, forcing Lang and Fei to join forces as an unlikely bond begins to form between them.

programme.title: Girl with the Diamond Slipper
programme.desc: An aspiring TV actress gets into hot water when a stolen diamond is hidden in the shoes she bought for a party.

programme.title: Women
programme.desc: Bo Yi’s husband is having an affair, so Bo Yi divorces him and joins the "Happy Spinsters Club" set up by her friends. However, she soon finds out that she does not enjoy being single and while sorting out her thoughts, her repentant husband begs her forgiveness. She must now decide on what she truly wants.

programme.title: Casino Tycoon II
programme.desc: This is a sequel to “Casino Tycoon”. 20 years after Benny Ho established his casino empire in Macau, his former partner becomes envious and plots to bring him down. At the same time, a young man working for Benny is the son of his ex-lover, and is also out to take revenge on him. Ho however, is not about to take things lying down…

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Comparing to the director's previous Hex. This time, however, the stakes are even higher and the gruesome goings-on even more memorable. It all starts when a noble police detective starts investigating a child killer's claims of an evil spell, then it doesn't let up until the final, bloated, maggot-ridden cadaver falls.

programme.title: Turns We Take
programme.desc: A spicy hot pot restaurant in Northeast China serves different types of customers every day. Amongst them are a sweet young couple, two wayward young men and a taxi driver. Despite being complete strangers to each other, their lives are intertwined by a traffic accident…

programme.title: The Monkey is Back
programme.desc: The savior of the people, Stone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl which he promises to realize. Years later, Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world. Can he fulfill his promise to the girl and stop the God of Wood from destroying earth?

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: 36 Secrets of Courtship
programme.desc: This erotic comedy features three lotharios who vie to become principal of the Macho Man Training School -- an extremely sexy institution dedicated to extremely non Shaolin-types of physical exertion.

programme.title: Let's Have a Baby
programme.desc: De Sheng and Wan Jun have been married for years, but are unable to conceive. Wan Jun decides to undergo artificial insemination in the States and finally gets pregnant. She meets her cousin from the States who stays temporarily in their house with them, and De Sheng begins to suspect that they are having an affair…

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: The Dragon King is locked in a seal by the Dragon Master for 500 years, and his daughter must travel back in time to 500 years ago to kill the Dragon Master, in order to reverse the act. Little did she know that the Dragon King and Dragon Master were close friends back then…

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey1-Pandora's box
programme.desc: Joker, a carefree bandit leader, learns he is the reincarnation of the Monkey King. As demons and immortals close in, he is drawn into a chaotic, time-bending journey with the mystical Pandora’s Box. Caught between past and present, he must choose between destiny and freedom.

programme.title: Painted Face
programme.desc: Scholar Wang Huai Qing sells paintings to save his ailing wife. He is attacked by a bird demon along the way but is rescued by Fox demon Xiao Rong. To elude the pursuit, Wang brings Xiao Rong home, sparking a love triangle and at the same time, unfolding an impending love between human and demon.

programme.title: Doubles Cause Troubles
programme.desc: Two squabbling cousins find themselves in more trouble than they can imagine after their tenant ends up dead. The gangsters and the police are both after them, and they have no idea what they have done wrong!

programme.title: The Fate of Reunion
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago, Green Snake gained enlightenment under the guidance of Dao Qing and gradually falls for him. However, her devotion to Dao Qing caused him to reincarnate and go through the pains of death. Since then, she sets out to search for the many reincarnations of Dao Qing over hundreds of years to help him reverse the situation…

programme.title: Sixty Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Sing is a rich man studying abroad, but is so spoiled that he can never concentrate on his studies but spends his time flirting with girls. One day, Sing gets blown up by a mobster when he hooks up with his mistress, Silvia. This arrogant prankster is resurrected instead as an unbeatable cyborg with unique skills, a real job and a new true love.

programme.title: The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: Gangster Chen Da Qi rises to the upper echelons of power, but finds himself torn between the love of two women, the murderous plots of the secret service, and the looming threat of war.

programme.title: How to Pick Girls Up !
programme.desc: Xin, a helpless loser in love, calls in to a radio show hosted by DJ Tsang to ask desperately for help. A self-proclaimed love expert, Tsang takes it upon himself to make sure Xin meets girls and leads him on a series of absurd excursions into the wild and dangerous world of modern love.

programme.title: Mr Vampire Saga 4
programme.desc: A Buddhist monk and Taoist priest put aside their differences to take on vampires that have been struck by lightning and have now become a super powered threat to mankind.

programme.title: The Kung-fu Instructor
programme.desc: Wong Yang is a famous martial artist who is forced to teach kung fu to the Mong Clan, an evil clan which is trying to destroy its nemesis, the Chow Clan. Chow Ping from the Chow Clan is a student of Wong's caught in the Mong's territory and as punishment, the Mong Clan wants to cut off Chow Ping's limbs. Wong steps in to defend his student.

programme.title: Return of the Phoenix
programme.desc: An imperial minister Cheng betroths his pretty younger daughter, Ye, to his friend's son, Mu. His wife however, refuses to let Ye marry before her elder daughter Yan, who is ugly and undesirable. Yan is asked to pretend as Ye to meet Mu but scares him away. A rich guy who likes Ye meanwhile pretends as Mu to attend the wedding...

programme.title: The Twelve Gold Medallions
programme.desc: This was one of top three films of 1970 and winner of "Outstanding Drama" at the 9th Golden Horse Awards. The evil minister uses twelve golden medallions to summon war hero Yueh Fei back from the frontline and execute him. A group of wandering warriors, led by Yueh Hua and Chin Ping, try to stop the medallion couriers.

programme.title: The Devil's Mirror
programme.desc: A power-hungry Witch who leads the Bloody Ghouls Clan, seeks two magical mirrors, Wind Mirror and Thunder Mirror, which are owned by Bai and the Wen Clan respectively. She needs both mirrors to find the location of a powerful weapon that will make her invincible and will stop at nothing to get her hands on them.

programme.title: Heroes Shed No Tears
programme.desc: Kao Chien Fei is a young swordsman who wields a special sword with a teardrop marked on its blade. He is charged with averting an impending crisis in the martial arts world, but the villain, Zhou Tung Lai, wishes to become the ruler in the martial arts world, and launches a scheme to pit the various heroes against one another.

programme.title: Killers Five
programme.desc: The Duke's daughter has been kidnapped by the notorious Golden Dragon Hill bandits. A swordman named Yue Zhen Bei is assigned to save her, and expecting many dangers on the journey, Yue garners help from a group of good friends who are also kung fu masters.

programme.title: Asia-pol
programme.desc: Asiapol agent Yang Ming Xuan trails a shipment of contraband gold being delivered to gang leader, George Eaton. He enlists the help of a Chinese woman who is trying to avenge her sister and narrowly escapes several deadly traps as he closes in on Eaton's location. This spy film is loosely inspired by the James Bond movies.

programme.title: The Bells of Death
programme.desc: Wei Fu is an unremarkable woodcutter. However, when psychotic marauders killed his family and abducted his sister, he goes through vigorous martial arts training with an expert swordsman in order to exact revenge on the evildoers.

programme.title: Hex after Hex
programme.desc: Hell may have no fury like a woman scorned, but hell literally, really has no wrath like a lusting ghost scorned! Cult classic director Kuei Chih-hung shoots the works with this amazing horror romance starring muscular "Venom" Lo Meng.

programme.title: Lovers Blades
programme.desc: The Lovers Blades, a pair of invincible weapons, are to be delivered to the Qing Emperor. However, they accidentally fell into the hands of Xiao Zhong Hui and Yuan Guan Nan, so Imperial Chief Zhuo Tian Xiong hunts them down for the blades. As the battle begins, the secret of the blades are also revealed.

programme.title: The Perfumed Arrow
programme.desc: A charming Huangmei Opera title, this is the story of Fei E, a General's daughter who grows up fooling everyone that she is a boy, including her two closest schoolmates. When she has to choose one of them to marry, how will Fei E tell them that she is a girl? To complicate matters, a girl who Fei E saves one day only wants to be married to her!

programme.title: The Proud Youth
programme.desc: Ling Hu Chong, a Huashan clan's disciple, is assigned to find the successor to the score "The Proud One". Ling identifies Ying for the score but finds out that she is the daughter of the evil clan's leader. At the same time, he is unwittingly dragged into an epic power struggle between clans, with complicated allegiances and perplexing moralities.

programme.title: The Purple Shell
programme.desc: Hui and Ha are stuck in their unhappy marriages and are attracted to each other when they meet at a party. In one of their beach strolls, Ha picks up a purple shell and gives it to Hui as a memento. When Hui's husband finds out about them, he hurts Hui and causes her to become seriously ill, while also blackmails Ha. How will this love story end?

programme.title: Twelve Deadly Coins
programme.desc: When Qiao Miao is about to kill the bandit whom he just met, he is attracted by her beauty and they quickly fall in love. The two later discover the blood feud between the owner of the unique weapon - "Twelve Deadly Coins" and the old master who controls the bandit...

programme.title: The Singing Escort
programme.desc: Betty Ting plays Susan, a young woman hiding from her father by being a nightclub singer in Japan. Pop singer Chao Ke-jen (Lin Chong) gets permission from his boss to visit Japan, with the condition that he finds the boss's daughter. Boy finds girl, boy falls in love. But will the father approve?

programme.title: Lady Of Steel
programme.desc: A young swordswoman Fang Ying Qi sets out to join the Flying Dragon Clan in their defense against the invading Jin forces. Fang also intends to avenge the murder of her parents by bandit leader Han 20 years ago. Han has since taken on a false identity as a member of the Flying Dragon Clan and Fang must rely on her deadly sword skills to stop Han.

programme.title: Illicit Desire
programme.desc: This instant cult classic adapts three erotic and mystical tales from the Chinese classical works, with stories spanning across time from the Tang to Ming dynasties. The stories, filled with characters such as emperors, concubines, monks and fortune-tellers, intertwine in a world of adultery, lust and greed, alongside great costumes!

programme.title: The Bride Napping
programme.desc: A rich girl Yue Ying, together with her maid Chun Lan, encounter a poor scholar Bian Ji at a fête. Chun Lan realizes Yue Ying is in love with him, but mixes his identity with a bandit due to an old servant's confusion, threatening the couple's union. After a series of complications, misunderstandings and mismatches, Chun Lan finally saves the day.

programme.title: Fangs of the Cobra
programme.desc: Incredibly, the title serpent is not a harbinger of horror, but actually the film's hero. This virtuous viper sniffs out bombs, fights gangs, battles a baby-killing rodent and even takes on a duplicitous woman. This one-of-a-kind thriller will be applauded by reptile fans everywhere.

programme.title: Have Sword Will Travel
programme.desc: When the head of a manor loses his kung fu skills, he enlists his nephew and fiancee to escort gold to the capital. Along the way, they encounter a mysterious swordsman and join forces with him to stop bandits from stealing the gold.

programme.title: The Twin Bracelets
programme.desc: Two teenage girls make a pledge to look after each other in a small Chinese fishing town, where the notions of women's rights or sexual freedom are absent. One ends up happily married to a stranger, while the other is cruelly betrothed to the abusive son of a wealthy family and has to seek to free herself from the situation.

programme.title: The Deadly Knives
programme.desc: Martial arts student Yen returns from school to defend his family homestead against Japanese financiers after his father is killed. On the way, he meets Hua and falls in love with her. However, Hua discovers that her father is plotting with the Japanese to take Yen's property and wants to murder him. It is a tough choice between family and love...

programme.title: The Mirror and the Lichee
programme.desc: The curious title in this Huangmei Opera romance refers to the two props that signal a happy beginning between a scholar and a local beauty. The scholar polishes mirrors so as to be closer to his love, who signals her approval by tossing him some lichees. From that point on the course of their love becomes rocky, complete with murder and suicide.

programme.title: The Fake Ghost Catchers
programme.desc: Huan Zhu's ghost seeks help from "Fake Ghost Catchers" Bao Tuo and Zhou Peng, after a jealous suitor's ghost seeks vengeance by murdering her and now targeting her sister. Together with actor Wu Shun Chao who possesses a supernatural talent, they unite to protect Huan Zhu's sister from both mortal and spectral threats.

programme.title: The Blue and the Black
programme.desc: Set during the Japanese occupation in World War II, a young orphan Tang Qi falls in a love with a young man Chang. However, their love is filled with challenges, from family pressure to the turmoil of war. When Tang Qi was raped, she is expelled from home to become a nightclub singer and embarks on a journey of no return...

programme.title: Call to Arms
programme.desc: The aggressive and dangerous Chin Empire conquers the hard-put Chao kingdom while the Wei empire is drained of its heroes and paralyzed by an indecisive ruler. Adventure, intrigue, death and tragedy reigns before the triumphant clash of the armies.

programme.title: Carry on Doctors and Nurses
programme.desc: At St. Morant Hospital, a harried but lovely administrator must deal with lusty interns, student nurses, a delirious surgeon, a dissection fiend, a criticizing Commissioner and gross negligence at regular intervals! This comedy is based on the hugely successful British Carry On! film series.

programme.title: The Magnificent Ruffians
programme.desc: Renowned martial arts clan heir Yuan Ying Fei hires four down-and-out martial artists to eliminate the local escort agency's young chief, Guan Yuan. Unexpectedly, the four befriend Guan instead. When Yuan's conspiracy leads to Guan's death, they unite to avenge him.

programme.title: Family Light Affair
programme.desc: Alfred Cheung Kin-ting returns to the screen with this seriocomic look at the clash of cultures which result when a Mainland Chinese peasant brings his family to Hong Kong. Family Light Affair, whose Chinese title literally translates as "City Lights", is the director/writer's warm-hearted memoir of street life back in the early 1980s, featuring an eclectic cast of pop music and kung fu stars who shine in their poignant roles.

programme.title: Romance on the Farm - EP 15
programme.desc: Lian Man'er takes on an ambitious new project despite repeated setbacks and scepticism from others. With her family standing behind her and Shen Nuo offering quiet support, she becomes more determined than ever to create a better future.

programme.title: Romance on the Farm - EP 16
programme.desc: Lian Man'er's business continues to grow, but unexpected competition threatens to undo her hard work. Shen Nuo quietly supports her from behind the scenes, though his own concerns remain unresolved.
